tree.title: 3.4 Corporate Deposits

pages.summary: This page introduces the document's preface and outlines the activation process for sample reports, including menu and report roles.
This page introduces the document's structure and content, including chapters on activating sample reports, listing module-wise reports, and providing a function ID glossary.
pages.raw_text:
1-1
1. Preface
1.1 
Introduction
This document list the steps to activate the sample reports and also lists the module-wise 
sample reports that are pre-shipped with the FLEXCUBE.
1.2 
Audience
This manual is intended for the following User/User Roles:
1.3 
Documentation Accessibility
For information about Oracle's commitment to accessibility, visit the Oracle Accessibility 
Program website at http://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=acc&id=docacc.
1.4 
Organization
1.5 
Glossary of Icons
This User Manual may refer to all or some of the following icons.
Role
Function
Back office Managers/Officers
Activation of Reports
Financial Controller/Product Managers
Generation of reports
Chapter
Description
Chapter 1
About this Manual gives a brief introduction to the module. It also lists 
the various chapters covered in this User Manual. 
Chapter 2
Activation of Sample Reports explains the details to activate the reports 
in FLEXCUBE. 
Chapter 3
Sample Reports in FLEXCUBE lists the module wise reports. 
Chapter 4
Function ID Glossary has alphabetical listing of Function/Screen ID's
used in the module with page references for quick navigation.
Icons
Function
Exit
Add row
Delete row
Option List

pages.summary: This page explains how to activate sample reports in FLEXCUBE through the menu by using either the front end or back end methods.
pages.raw_text:
2-1
2. Activation of Sample Reports
In FLEXCUBE, the sample reports can be activated in two steps as follow:
Section 2.1, "Activation of Menu"
Section 2.2, "Activation of Report Roles"
Section 2.3, "Activation of EOD Reports"
2.1 
Activation of Menu
The sample reports can be activated in Menu in either of the following two ways:
Section 2.1.1, "Front End"
Section 2.1.2, "Back End"
2.1.1 
Front End
You can process the ‘Function Description Maintenance’ screen by typing ‘SMDFNDSC’ in 
the field at the top right corner of the application tool bar and clicking the adjoining arrow 
button. The ‘Function Description Maintenance’ screen is displayed.
To activate the sample reports from the front end, the ‘Available’ check box should be 
enabled by modifying the record. The user should modify and authorize the records.
2.1.2 
Back End
To activate the sample reports from the back end, update the static data of SMTB_MENU 
Available column to ‘1’ for all the reports.

pages.summary: This section explains how to activate report roles in a system by using the 'Role Maintenance' screen and specifies the details that need to be entered.
pages.raw_text:
2-2
2.2 
Activation of Report Roles
All the report roles end with the word ‘REPORTS’. These reports are pre-shipped as closed. 
You can process the ‘Role Maintenance’ screen by typing ‘SMDROLDF’ in the field at the 
top right corner of the Application tool bar and clicking the adjoining arrow button. The ‘Role 
Maintenance’ screen is displayed.
In this screen, specify the following details:
Role ID and Description
Specify the role Id of the reports. Alternatively, you can select the appropriate role Id from the 
option list. The system displays the role description.
Initially, all the report roles would be in closed status, the user can reopen the report roles by 
clicking on the ‘Reopen’ button.

pages.summary: This page provides instructions on how to reopen something by clicking the 'Reopen' button and then confirming with the 'Ok' button.
pages.raw_text:
2-3
For Instance,
Click the ‘Reopen’ button. The confirmation message window is displayed. Click the ‘Ok’ 
button.

pages.summary: This page describes how to activate EOD reports through either an EOD scheduler job or a report batch in the Menu.
pages.raw_text:
2-4
The Information Message window is displayed. Click the ‘Ok’ button. Now the report roles are 
in opened status.
2.3 
Activation of EOD Reports
The EOD reports can be activated in Menu in either of the following two ways:
Section 2.3.1, "Activation of EOD Scheduler Job"
Section 2.3.2, "Activation of EOD Report Batch"

pages.summary: This page explains how to activate the EOD scheduler job and report batches through specific maintenance screens.
pages.raw_text:
2-5
2.3.1 
Activation of EOD Scheduler Job
The Scheduler Job is used to generate Reports at EOD. The Scheduler Job can be activated 
by checking the Active checkbox from the Job Maintenance (STDJOBMT) screen.
2.3.2 
Activation of EOD Report Batch
To activate the EOD report batches in the Report Batch Maintenance (RPDBATCH) screen, 
enable the Available check box by modifying the records in Function Description 
Maintenance (SMDFNDSC) screen as explained in the Section 2.1.1, "Front End". The user 
must modify and authorize the records.

pages.summary: This page explains that batches managed in the Report Batch Maintenance screen can be accessed through the Mandatory Batch Program Maintenance (EIDMANPE) and that reports within these batches will be processed at end-of-day.
pages.raw_text:
2-6
All the batches maintained in the Report Batch Maintenance screen can be fetched in the 
Mandatory Batch Program Maintenance (EIDMANPE) and the reports which are part of the 
batches will be spooled during EOD.

pages.summary: This page details various reports and functions related to corporate deposits and Islamic financing, including accrual control, analysis, contract events, forward contracts, value dated amendments, maturity details, overdue schedules, contract retrieval, rate revisions, and linked contracts utilization.
pages.raw_text:
3-4
3.4 
Corporate Deposits
3.5 
Islamic Financing
Function Id
Report Name
Report Details
LDRPACCR
Accrual Control 
Accruals are done on deposits, as of a specific 
date. For Non-Accrual Basis (NAB) contracts, 
the interest, commission, fees, penalty 
interest, and penalty commission are 
calculated but no accrual entries are passed.
LDRPCALC
Accrual Analysis
Interest accrual details for single/multiple 
contracts across a date range.
LDRPEVNT
Contract Event Details
List of all the events that have taken place 
during the tenor of deposits for a specific 
product/all product codes or specific contracts 
across a date range.
LDRPFRWD
Corporate Deposits 
Forward Contracts 
All deposit details with a future value date. 
Only contracts that take effect on a date later 
than or same as the specified date are 
included in the report.
LDRPFWCH
Value Dated 
Amendments
Details any changes made to the terms of a 
deposit that come into effect on a future Value 
Date.
LDRPMATR
Maturity
Details of a deposit that is maturing during the 
period that you specify.
It also gives details of schedules of Deposits 
falling due during that period.
LDRPOSCH
Overdue Schedule 
All repayment schedules of a deposit are 
overdue.
LDRPRETR
Contract Retrieval 
Comprehensive information about deposits 
that are active, liquidated, and reversed can 
be retrieved through this report.
LDRPREVN
Rate Revision 
Details of the periodic rate revisions
LDRPLICU
Corporate Deposits 
Linked Contracts 
Utilization
Loans And Deposits Linked Contracts 
Utilization report.
LDRPSTAT
Adverse Status 
List all the details of adverse status.
Function Id
Report Name
Report Details
CIRACREV
Contract Reversal 
All Finance contracts that are reversed or 
within a time range.

sections: Future Payment List of contracts with future payments where grace days are selected and supplier grace days are maintained.

Consumer Lending

Today

sections: Manual Matching Details of all the matched entries.
Capture Exception The exceptions occurred while the entries that were posted to the internal accounts and GLs were being captured.

Reconciliation System Matched Items The entries that were matched during the current date, or you can generate the report to contain details of the entries that were matched for a specific reconciliation class + external entity + external account + currency combination using a specific reconciliation class.
Auto Match Exception The match exceptions that occurred as of a given date or you can indicate a specific match sequence number for which you want to retrieve details.
Reconciliation System Unmatched Items The unmatched internal and external transactions belonging to a Reconciliation Class + Accounting Entity + Currency combination
Upload Exception The statements that were uploaded during a given date or you can indicate the upload sequence number for which you want details.
RE External Statement Details the fields in the generated reports.
Exception Overrides are accepted during transaction processing.

The exceptions occurred while the entries that 
were posted to the internal accounts and GLs 
were being captured.
RERPMC
Reconciliation System 
Matched Items 
The entries that were matched during the 
current date, or you can generate the report to 
contain details of the entries that were 
matched for a specific reconciliation class + 
external entity + external account + currency 
combination using a specific reconciliation 
class.
RERPMCEX
Auto Match Exception 
 
The match exceptions that occurred as of a 
given date or you can indicate a specific match 
sequence number for which you want to 
retrieve details.
RERPUNMC
Reconciliation System 
Unmatched Items 
The unmatched internal and external 
transactions belonging to a Reconciliation 
Class + Accounting Entity + Currency 
combination
RERPUPEX
Upload Exception 
The statements that were uploaded during a 
given date or you can indicate the upload 
sequence number for which you want details.
RERSTMIN
RE External Statement 
Details the fields in the generated reports.
SVROV
Exception 
Overrides are accepted during transaction 
processing.

Combination Limit

Instruments Report – 
FCY Cheques under 
Cash Letter 
Arrangement

party between the date ranges.

Instruments Report – 
Overseas Cheques 
Payable Abroad Under 
Collection
Contracts that are dishonored by the other 
party between the date ranges.

Letter Arrangement
Register outward FCY Cheques on Cash

pages.summary: This page outlines various reports related to retail instruments, including realized instruments, maturity follow-up, overdue instruments, protested bills, instrument tracking, and bill/cheque transfers.
pages.raw_text:
3-28
RBROWLIQ
Realized Instruments 
Report - Outward
Retail outward instruments are successfully 
realized.
RBROWMAT
Maturity Follow up 
Report - Outward
Maturity follow up report-outward.
RBROWOVD
Overdue Instruments 
Report - Outward
Retail outward instruments are still overdue.
RBROWPRT
Protested Bills Report - 
Outward Bills for 
Collection
Retail outward and inward bills are protested 
by the collecting bank due to the non-payment 
by the drawee.
RBROWREG
Register - Outward 
Instruments
Helps you track the outward and inward retail 
instruments available in the system.
RBRTFRRB
Transfer Bills/Cheques 
Instruments that are lodged against another 
party who is a customer of your bank.

pages.summary: This page provides various reports related to time deposits, including summaries by total amount and currency-wise details, customer-wise large FD details, maturity dates, and more.
pages.raw_text:
3-30
TDRDDSUM
Deposit Detail 
Summary by Total 
Amount 
Summary of currency-wise deposit details.
TDRFDREP
Large FD 
Customer-wise details of large-time deposits 
beyond the given amount criteria.
TDRFIDEP
Customers Fixed 
Deposit 
Lists out all time deposit accounts for a given 
customer.
TDRFULBL
TD Full Balance Listing 
Complete listing of time deposit accounts 
opened till the run day.
TDRINREP
Interest Paid 
Term deposits interest paid for the day. 
TDRLNKOD
TD linked to Overdraft 
Account 
TD’s linked to the overdraft account of the 
customer
TDRMATR
Term Deposits Account 
Maturity 
Term deposits that will be matured for the 
given period.
TDRMDCHG
Term Deposit Account 
Maturity Date Change 
TD account maturity date change report for 
term deposits that have the maturity date 
adjusted due to adhoc holiday change.
TDRMDFOH
TD Account Maturity 
Date Falling on a 
Holiday 
Term deposit for which the maturity date falls 
on a holiday due to Adhoc holiday change.
TDRMNADJ
TD Account Maturity 
Date not adjusted 
Term deposit for which the maturity date is not 
adjusted and falls on a holiday
TDROPEN
Term Deposits Opened 
for the Period 
Deposit accounts which are opened for the 
given period, and that are currently on open 
status.
TDRPRSUM
TD Account Class 
Summary 
MIS information like principal amount, interest 
amount, etc. with respect to term deposit 
accounts of the bank.
TDRRENEW
Term Deposits Account 
Renewed 
This report lists the term deposit accounts 
which are renewed for the given period.
TDRRTMOD
Term Deposit with User 
Modified Exchange 
Rate 
Term Deposits where the rate is modified by 
the user in the pay-out or pay-in grid.
TDRSOACC
TD Statement of 
Accounts 
Financial transactions that are customer 
initiated along with the interest payout and tax 
deduction if any that has taken place in a time 
deposit account.
TDRTOPUP
Term Deposits Topped-
up During the Period
This report can be generated for all branches 
or for specific branches for an account.
